title: Why Bernal Heights Is the Best Weekend Getaway in San Francisco
content: # A Long Weekend in Bernal Heights: San Francisco’s Hidden Gem. Known for its unique blend of natural beauty, culture, and history, San Francisco consistently ranks in the top cities to visit in the U.S. for good reason. This is a love letter to my neighborhood, where all of that still exists amongst the glossier parts of San Francisco. It became home for my young family, and while my kids have grown and are out exploring the world on their own now, I’ve remained in this eccentric pocket of San Francisco. Here’s how to live like a hyperlocal in my neighborhood. With the influx of settlers arriving after the discovery of gold in the area in 1848, Bernal Heights began to develop as a residential neighborhood. Pinhole Coffee is a community hub in the neighborhood, featuring the work of local artists both in the café’s design and on its walls.
